subheadline: We take care of our team so they can do their best work.

perks.title: Health & Wellness
perks.description: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance for you and your family.

perks.title: Unlimited PTO
perks.description: Take the time you need to recharge. We trust you to manage your schedule.

perks.title: Equipment Budget
perks.description: $3,000 annual stipend for your home office setup and productivity tools.

perks.title: Learning & Development
perks.description: $2,000 yearly budget for conferences, courses, and professional growth.
